subject: FW: CERN Visit
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: Brian Cox [mailto:brian.cox@cern.ch] 
Sent: Friday, February 29, 2008 9:17 PM
To: Meg Rand
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: CERN Visit

Dear Lesley,

As Meg says, I'll be happy to help if I can.

Cheers,

Brian

On 28 Feb 2008, at 15:13, Meg Rand wrote:

> Dear Lesley,
>
> By way of following up to Mr. Epstein's call with Adam earlier this 
> week, I would like to put you in touch with Dr. Brian Cox, a physicist

> at CERN in Geneva and good friend of Seed. Mr. Epstein had indicated 
> that he might like to tour the LHC while visiting Switzerland in 
> March, and Brian has kindly agreed to show him around if the timing 
> works out on both ends.
>
> Brian is copied above, so that you may coordinate the details 
> directly.
>
>
> All the best,
> Meg.
>
>
>
>
> Meg Rand
> Director, Office of the CEO
> Seed Media Group
> 12 West 21st Street, 7th Floor
> New York, NY 10010

> T / 646-502-7051
> F / 646-502-7040

body_html:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

-----Original Message-----
From: Brian Cox [mailto:brian.cox@cern.ch]
Sent: Friday, February 29, 2008 9:17 PM
To: Meg Rand
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: CERN Visit

Dear Lesley,

As Meg says, I'll be happy to help if I can.

Cheers,

Brian

On 28 Feb 2008, at 15:13, Meg Rand wrote:

Dear Lesley,

By way of following up to Mr. Epstein's call with Adam earlier this
week, I would like to put you in touch with Dr. Brian Cox, a physicist

at CERN in Geneva and good friend of Seed. Mr. Epstein had indicated
that he might like to tour the LHC while visiting Switzerland in
March, and Brian has kindly agreed to show him around if the timing
works out on both ends.

Brian is copied above, so that you may coordinate the details
directly.

All the best,
Meg.

Meg Rand
Director, Office of the CEO
